title: "super.finalize()" should be called at the end of "Object.finalize()" implementations
description: Overriding the Object.finalize() method must be done with caution to dispose of system resources. It is highly recommended to call the super.finalize() at the end of this method implementation to ensure parent implementations can also dispose of system resources.
recommendation: Always call super.finalize() at the end of Object.finalize() implementations to ensure proper resource disposal.
impact: Ignoring this rule could lead to improper disposal of system resources, leading to memory leaks and other related issues.
